summary: Full testing of currency feature addition and legacy cleanup (iteration 18 → report 116). Tested backend APIs and frontend UI for: base-currency GET/PUT, product currency field, override_codes removal, form_responses removal, checkout messages cleanup, partner registration base_currency, orders/subscriptions currency columns, scope-final resource currency, system config base currency widget. All 15 feature tests PASS.

minor.issue: exports.py still has export_quote_requests_csv and export_override_codes_csv functions referencing db.quote_requests and db.override_codes. These collections are empty/dropped so exports return empty CSVs. Non-critical but legacy code could be cleaned up.

action_items: Optional: Clean up exports.py - remove export_quote_requests_csv and export_override_codes_csv functions (legacy cleanup, non-breaking)
Optional: Consider removing/archiving ArticlesTab.tsx since it is no longer imported in Admin.tsx (orphaned file)
critical_code_review_comments: checkout.py: currency correctly sourced from product (not customer), base_currency from tenant - GOOD
misc.py: GET/PUT base-currency endpoints properly implemented with all 7 currencies validated
ResourcesTab.tsx: currency appears ONLY when scope-final category selected - GOOD conditional rendering
ProductForm.tsx: CURRENCY field is mandatory (marked with *) in Pricing tab - GOOD
Cart.tsx: override code and partner tag removed, currency display from product - GOOD
Admin.tsx: No ArticlesTab import - ArticlesTab.tsx is an orphaned file (not rendered anywhere)

PUT /admin/tenant/base-currency: platform admin (automate-accounts) CAN update currency because tenant_id_of(platform_admin) returns DEFAULT_TENANT_ID which is non-empty. Check if this is intended behavior.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All currency feature additions and legacy cleanup verified working. Base currency: GET/PUT API on /api/admin/tenant/base-currency, System Config UI widget with 7 currencies (USD/CAD/EUR/AUD/GBP/INR/MXN). Products have required currency field in Pricing tab. Orders/Subscriptions tables show Currency column. scope-final resources show currency dropdown. Partner registration (/login -> 'Register as a partner' -> /signup?type=partner) has BASE CURRENCY field. Override codes: removed from Resources/Articles subtabs, from Customers tab, from checkout messages, and endpoint returns 404. Form Responses tile gone from Auth & Pages. ArticlesTab.tsx exists but is NOT imported in Admin.tsx (orphaned file).
rca_of_issues: No critical bugs found. Only minor legacy code remaining in exports.py (will not cause errors as collections are empty/dropped).
